findings.title: Insecure deserialization with pickle
findings.description: Using pickle.loads() on untrusted data allows arbitrary code execution. Pickle can deserialize and execute malicious Python objects, leading to remote code execution.
findings.fix: Use safe serialization formats like JSON, or implement input validation and use pickle only with trusted data sources. Consider using safer alternatives like json.loads() or implementing a whitelist of allowed classes.
